TITLE: Good, The Bad, The Ugly, The
Bond - Man With The Golden Gun, The
Bell, Book And Candle
DESCRIPT: Gillian Holroyd (Kim Novak), who is part of a family of witches that includes Aung Queenie (Elsa Lanchester) and brother Nicky (Jack Lemmon), falls in love with Sheperd Henderson (James Stewart) on the eve of his marriage to Merle Kittridge (Janice Rule).  Gillian wastes no time in casting a spell over Shep, causing him to ditch Merle for herself.  However, when Gillian tells Shep the truth, he angrily seeks the help of the bizarre Mrs. De Pass (Hermione Gingold), who releases him from Gillian's spell.  But Aunt Queenie manages to reunite the pair with the help of a powerful magic ... love!
